cards.back: A software development approach that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and rapid delivery to enhance software quality.
A software development technique that involves writing automated tests before writing the actual code to ensure high software quality.
A software engineering practice that involves regularly integrating code changes into a central repository to detect errors and improve software quality.
A software development technique where two programmers work together on the same code, improving code quality, reducing bugs, and enhancing collaboration.
A process where a developer reviews another developer's code to ensure it meets the required standards, improves code quality, and reduces errors.
